title: Trying to update a RACING SESSION with invalid data types
gherkin:
Given there exists a "RACING SESSION" "Qualifying"
When the user updates the node "Qualifying" with the following data
  | key | value |
  | name | 1234 |
  | start_date | 1234 |
  | start_time | 1234 |
  | duration | TEST |
  | duration_unit | 1234 |
  | distance | TEST |
  | distance_unit | 1234 |
Then the request should be rejected with status code 400
